serviceDescs.mechanical-repair: Expert mechanical repairs by certified technicians.
serviceDescs.transmission-repair: Gearbox inspection, fluid check and shift quality assessment.
serviceDescs.suspension-repair: Full inspection of shocks, struts, bushings and steering.
serviceDescs.brake-services: Pads, discs and brake fluid check for maximum stopping power.
serviceDescs.electrical-repair: Diagnose battery, alternator, wiring and electronic faults.
serviceDescs.computer-diagnostics: OBD-II scan and full engine analysis to identify fault codes.
serviceDescs.key-lock-services: Key programming, lock repair and replacement.
serviceDescs.oil-change: Full oil and filter change with genuine lubricants.
serviceDescs.preventive-maintenance: Proactive servicing to prevent costly breakdowns.
serviceDescs.quick-service: Fast essential services while you wait.
serviceDescs.ac-repair: Air conditioning system inspection and repair.
serviceDescs.cooling-system-service: Comprehensive cooling system check and service.
serviceDescs.paint: Full and partial paintwork with colour matching.
serviceDescs.car-glass-repair: Windshield and window repair or replacement.
serviceDescs.wheel-alignment: Wheel alignment and balancing for even tyre wear.
serviceDescs.car-accessories: Car accessories, audio and sound system installation.
serviceDescs.gps-tracking: GPS tracker installation and fleet management.
serviceDescs.car-polishing: Machine polishing for a showroom shine.
serviceDescs.car-upholstery: Interior seat and trim repair and replacement.
serviceDescs.car-wrapping: Vinyl wrap and paint protection film application.
serviceDescs.vehicle-inspection: Full vehicle health check by certified technicians.
serviceDescs.pre-purchase-inspection: Comprehensive check before buying a used vehicle.

billing.title: Billing
billing.scSubtitle: Your monthly invoices — billed per booking.
billing.scInfo: Bills are generated automatically at the end of each monthly period. Each bill = total bookings × your booking fee. To settle a pending invoice, click Pay and follow the bank transfer instructions.
billing.psInfo: Your share of each order is calculated automatically when an order is placed. The platform settles your earnings monthly via bank transfer.
billing.noInvoices: No invoices yet. Bills appear here after your first complete billing period.

applyPages.applySubtitle: Join Egypt's #1 automotive platform as a seller or service center.
applyPages.pendingDesc: Your application is being reviewed. We'll notify you by email.
applyPages.approvedDesc: Congratulations! Your application has been approved.
applyPages.rejectedDesc: Unfortunately your application was not approved at this time.
applyPages.heroTitle: Sell to Thousands of Car Owners
applyPages.heroSubtitle: Join Warshety's growing network of spare parts shops and service centers. Get discovered, receive orders, and grow your automotive business online.
applyPages.whyPartnerSubtitle: Everything you need to run and grow your automotive business online.
applyPages.benefit0Desc: Tap into thousands of car owners across Egypt actively searching for parts and services every day.
applyPages.benefit1Desc: List your inventory or services and start receiving orders with secure, on-time payouts.
applyPages.benefit2Desc: Access real-time analytics, customer insights, and marketing tools to scale faster.
applyPages.howWorkSubtitle: A simple, transparent process from application to your first sale.
applyPages.step0Desc: Fill in your business details. Takes less than 5 minutes.
applyPages.step1Desc: Our team reviews your application and notifies you within 48 hours.
applyPages.step2Desc: Our team activates the account you created during your application. No invite emails — just log in and go.
applyPages.step3Desc: Go live and start receiving orders from customers across Egypt.
applyPages.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know before applying.
applyPages.faq0Q: Who can become a vendor on Warshety?
applyPages.faq0A: Any registered spare parts shop or automotive service center operating in Egypt. We accept both individual shop owners and multi-branch businesses.
applyPages.faq1Q: How long does the approval process take?
applyPages.faq1A: Applications are reviewed within 48 business hours. You'll receive an email with the outcome and next steps.
applyPages.faq2A: Commission rates vary by category and are shared transparently during onboarding. There are no hidden fees.
applyPages.faq3A: A valid commercial registration (سجل تجاري), national ID of the owner, and your business contact details.
applyPages.faq4Q: Can I list both parts and services?
applyPages.faq4A: Currently vendors register as either a Spare Parts Shop or a Service Center. Multi-category support is coming soon.
applyPages.faq5A: Payouts are processed weekly via bank transfer or Instapay. You can track all earnings in your vendor dashboard.
applyPages.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of vendors already selling on Warshety. The application takes less than 5 minutes.
applyPages.applyFormSubtitle: Fill in your basic details to get started. It only takes a few minutes.
applyPages.credentialsNote: These credentials are for your vendor dashboard only. They are completely separate from any personal Warshety account you may have.
applyPages.businessEmailHint: Use a business email — different from your personal account.
applyPages.legalSubtitle: This information is required for KYC verification and compliance.
applyPages.legalIdentityDesc: Upload a clear photo or scan of the owner's National ID. This is used to verify your identity and will be reviewed by our team.
applyPages.legalUploadHint: JPG, PNG or PDF · Max 5 MB

billing.title: Billing Management
billing.subtitle: Track fees, commissions, and payouts for service centers and parts sellers.
billing.confirmPaidHint: Are you sure you want to mark this record as paid? This action cannot be undone.
billing.generateHint: Counts all non-cancelled bookings in the selected period and applies the vendor's booking fee and subscription rate.

billing.scFormulaLine1: Monthly Bill = Bookings Count × Fee per Booking
billing.scFormulaLine2: Bills are generated automatically at month end — vendor settles via bank transfer.
billing.autoBillingNote: Bills are generated automatically each month
billing.psFormulaLine2: Platform Share = Final Amount × Commission Rate ÷ 100
billing.psFormulaLine3: Vendor Share = Final Amount − Platform Share

billing.bookingFeeHint: Fixed fee charged per appointment booked.

billing.commissionRateHint: Platform percentage taken from each order.
